tests.name: Na
tests.notes: Narrow critical range. <130 or >150 is serious

tests.name: Ca
tests.notes: Also in bone metabolism panel. Correct for albumin

ocr_traps.Ca_garbled: Google Vision reads 'Ca' as 'Call' or 'Ca1'. The value should be ~8-12
ocr_traps.Na_garbled: Google reads 'Na' as 'Nal' or 'Na1'. Value should be ~135-150
ocr_traps.K_decimal: K is typically 3,5-5,5 with one decimal. A value of 41 is probably 4,1
ocr_traps.P_prefix: Google sometimes prepends digits — 'P14,5' is P: 4,5 not P: 14,5
